precondition: User exists with full_name/email/phone matching keyword and deleted_at is null
note: Keyword matches full_name, email, or phone case-insensitively

precondition: Users exist with users.role_id referencing role code STAFF and deleted_at is null
note: Result contains only users whose roleCode is STAFF

precondition: Users exist with status_code ACTIVE and deleted_at is null
note: Result contains only users whose statusCode is ACTIVE

precondition: Users exist matching keyword, role, and status; deleted_at is null
No keyword, role, or status criteria are provided
note: Admin UI may load the first paginated account page without search criteria

precondition: No non-deleted user matches the provided criteria
note: Response is successful with empty page content

precondition: Only matching user has deleted_at not null
Matching user has password_hash in database
note: Response must not contain password_hash or passwordHash

precondition: Request status is not part of user_status_enum
note: Only UNVERIFIED, ACTIVE, LOCKED, DISABLED are valid
